name: Orlandi Valuta
description_short: Chicago, IL's Orlandi Valuta on N Pulaski Rd provides check cashing and currency exchange services.
description_long:
Located at 801 N Pulaski Rd on Chicago's West Side, Orlandi Valuta is a check-cashing and currency exchange store serving the local community. This Chicago location operates seven days a week with extended hours: Monday through Friday 7AM–9PM, Saturday 7AM–6PM, and Sunday 10AM–6PM for maximum convenience.

At this Chicago, IL branch, you can cash checks, exchange currency, and send money transfers. Call +1 773-274-2600 to inquire about current exchange rates or verify services available.

For Chicago residents who need check cashing without a traditional bank account, bring your government-issued ID. The N Pulaski Rd location provides a quick alternative for handling everyday financial needs in the area.
address: 801 N Pulaski Rd 111th &, S Michigan Ave Ce, Chicago, IL 60651

company_info.headquarters: 801 N Pulaski Rd 111th &, S Michigan Ave Ce, Chicago, IL 60651

pros: 20 years of operational experience in international money transfers
Established agent network across multiple countries for local pickup options
Specializes in US-to-Mexico transfers, the largest remittance corridor from the US
Serves 9 destination countries including major remittance destinations
Accepts USD transfers from the United States
Physical agent locations provide alternatives to bank transfer-only services
cons: Website provides no information on exchange rates, fees, or transfer costs for comparison
No details on transfer speed or delivery timeframes disclosed
Limited online presence and details compared to larger money transfer competitors
No information on minimum or maximum transfer amounts
No customer service contact information or support hours visible on provided content
best_for: US-based senders regularly transferring money to Mexico
Customers in Latin American communities preferring agent-based pickups over bank transfers
Consumers seeking alternatives to digital-only money transfer platforms
diagnosis: Orlandi Valuta is best for customers in the US sending remittances to Mexico or other Latin American countries who prefer using established agent networks for local fund pickup rather than direct bank transfers. The main caveat is that the website lacks essential pricing, speed, and fee information, requiring direct contact with the company to evaluate competitiveness against other money transfer providers.
services: International money transfers from United States to Mexico
